creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm... this port builds fine in tinderbox:

http://www.rafan.org/tb/logs/7-FreeBSD/awesome-3.1.1.log

Is all dependent port up to date? It seems that for some unknown reason,
the generated tokenize.h has some weird characters inside. 

BTW, what's your locale setting? If not English, try set it to something
like C or POSIX then try again.

Thanks!
